title: crinum piliferum
intro: Crinum piliferum, also known as the bulbous crinum, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Crinum piliferum often involve its roots and bulbs being dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
